sentences.english: I start every morning with a cup of coffee.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 커피 한 잔으로 시작해요.

sentences.english: I grind the beans fresh and use a drip coffee maker.
sentences.korean: 원두를 갓 갈아서 드립 커피 메이커를 사용해요.

sentences.english: The smell of fresh coffee is the best part of waking up.
sentences.korean: 갓 내린 커피 향이 일어나면서 가장 좋은 부분이에요.

sentences.english: I drink it black with no sugar and no cream.
Without my morning coffee I can't focus on anything.
sentences.korean: 아침 커피 없이는 아무것에도 집중할 수 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
